rules.no_labels: evidence log: 라벨 시트는 오타/불균형 유발 — 텍스트 전면 금지
rules.slot_margin: 셀 경계 접촉 금지, 점유율 검사로 강제
rules.anchor_reuse: 동일 캐릭터 디자인이므로 기존 매니페스트 bbox를 타깃 앵커로 재사용

slots.description: left eye white sclera shape only (eyeball base, no iris)
left eye iris disc only, with the character's iris color and shading
left eye pupil only, small dark ellipse
left eye light highlights only, small white sparkle shapes
left eye upper eyelash line with lash details
left eye lower eyelash line, thin and subtle
left eye fully closed eyelid line on skin-tone lid shape
left eye socket underpaint, flat skin-tone filler shape
right eye white sclera shape only (eyeball base, no iris)
right eye iris disc only, with the character's iris color and shading
right eye pupil only, small dark ellipse
right eye light highlights only, small white sparkle shapes
right eye upper eyelash line with lash details
right eye lower eyelash line, thin and subtle
right eye fully closed eyelid line on skin-tone lid shape
right eye socket underpaint, flat skin-tone filler shape

sheets.prompt:
Anime character PART SHEET for Live2D-style rigging. Square 2048x2048 image.
The ENTIRE background must be one flat solid magenta color #FF00FF with no gradient.
Imagine an invisible 4x4 grid of 512px cells.
Draw EXACTLY ONE isolated element per cell, centered in its cell, fully inside the cell
with generous margin; nothing may touch or cross cell boundaries.
STRICT: no text, no labels, no numbers, no grid lines, no boxes, no full character,
no extra elements, no drop shadows on the background.
Every element must match the art style, line weight, colors and facial design of the
attached reference character EXACTLY (same character).
Elements by cell (row, column), top-left is (1,1):
- (1,1): left eye white sclera shape only (eyeball base, no iris)
- (1,2): left eye iris disc only, with the character's iris color and shading
- (1,3): left eye pupil only, small dark ellipse
- (1,4): left eye light highlights only, small white sparkle shapes
- (2,1): left eye upper eyelash line with lash details
- (2,2): left eye lower eyelash line, thin and subtle
- (2,3): left eye fully closed eyelid line on skin-tone lid shape
- (2,4): left eye socket underpaint, flat skin-tone filler shape
- (3,1): right eye white sclera shape only (eyeball base, no iris)
- (3,2): right eye iris disc only, with the character's iris color and shading
- (3,3): right eye pupil only, small dark ellipse
- (3,4): right eye light highlights only, small white sparkle shapes
- (4,1): right eye upper eyelash line with lash details
- (4,2): right eye lower eyelash line, thin and subtle
- (4,3): right eye fully closed eyelid line on skin-tone lid shape
- (4,4): right eye socket underpaint, flat skin-tone filler shape

open mouth inner cavity shape, dark red interior only
upper lip shape only, soft skin-tone lip form
lower lip shape only, soft skin-tone lip form
upper teeth row only, small white teeth arc
tongue shape only, soft pink rounded form
left mouth corner accent stroke only, tiny
right mouth corner accent stroke only, tiny
